title: potentilla × wolfii
intro: Potentilla × wolfii, also known as Wolf's Cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as eczema, skin irritations, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and itching, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. Potentilla × wolfii can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
